text.ro: Aveti un inventar complet al tuturor echipamentelor IT?
text.en: Do you have a complete inventory of all IT equipment?

recommendation.ro: Implementati solutie automatizata de descoperire (Intune, Lansweeper, CMDB)
recommendation.en: Implement automated discovery solution (Intune, Lansweeper, CMDB)

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Aveti inventar complet al echipamentelor OT (SCADA, PLC, ICS)?
text.en: Do you have complete inventory of OT equipment (SCADA, PLC, ICS)?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati solutie pasiva OT (Claroty, Nozomi, Dragos etc)
recommendation.en: Use passive OT asset discovery (Claroty, Nozomi, Dragos etc)

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Sunt asset-urile clasificate in functie de criticitate?
text.en: Are assets classified based on criticality?

recommendation.ro: Definiti matrice de clasificare (confidential/critic/operational)
recommendation.en: Define classification matrix (confidential/critical/operational)

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Exista un responsabil clar pentru managementul asset-urilor?
text.en: Is there a clearly defined responsible person for asset management?

recommendation.ro: Atribuiti asset owner pentru fiecare categorie majora
recommendation.en: Assign asset owner for each major category

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Cum actualizati inventarul (automat/manual)?
text.en: How is the inventory updated (automatic/manual)?

recommendation.ro: Treceti la actualizare automata zilnica/saptamanala
recommendation.en: Move to daily/weekly automated update

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Este inventarul verificat periodic (ex: trimestrial)?
text.en: Is inventory periodically verified (e.g. quarterly)?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti reconciliere fizica anuala/semestriala
recommendation.en: Introduce annual/semi-annual physical reconciliation

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Aveti lista cu software autorizat si neautorizat?
text.en: Do you have list of authorized and unauthorized software?

recommendation.ro: Implementati whitelisting / application control
recommendation.en: Implement application whitelisting / control

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Exista control asupra dispozitivelor mobile / endpoint-uri personale?
text.en: Is there control over mobile devices / personal endpoints (BYOD)?

recommendation.ro: Implementati MDM/MAM + politica BYOD clara
recommendation.en: Implement MDM/MAM + clear BYOD policy

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Sunt evidentiate sistemele critice pentru continuitatea afacerii?
text.en: Are business continuity critical systems clearly identified?

recommendation.ro: Marcati sistemele BIA ca critice in inventar
recommendation.en: Tag BIA critical systems in inventory

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Aveti procedura de decommissioning a echipamentelor vechi?
text.en: Do you have decommissioning procedure for old equipment?

recommendation.ro: Definiti procedura de stergere criptografica / distrugere fizica
recommendation.en: Define cryptographic wipe / physical destruction procedure

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

description.ro: Domeniu de evaluare pentru managementul activelor

text.ro: Folositi Active Directory sau Azure AD pentru gestionarea userilor?
text.en: Do you use Active Directory or Azure AD for user management?

recommendation.ro: Migrati spre Azure AD/Entra ID ca sursa principala
recommendation.en: Migrate to Azure AD/Entra ID as primary identity source

text.ro: Este MFA obligatoriu pentru toti utilizatorii?
text.en: Is MFA mandatory for all users?

recommendation.ro: Activati MFA fara exceptii (Conditional Access + Security Defaults)
recommendation.en: Enforce MFA without exceptions (Conditional Access + Security Defaults)

text.ro: Exista conturi privilegiate si cum sunt controlate?
text.en: Do privileged accounts exist and how are they controlled?

recommendation.ro: Implementati Azure PIM sau solutie PAM dedicata
recommendation.en: Implement Azure PIM or dedicated PAM solution

text.ro: Revizuiti accesul periodic? Cat de des?
text.en: Do you review access periodically? How often?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti revizuire trimestriala cu raportare
recommendation.en: Introduce quarterly review with reporting

text.ro: Cum se gestioneaza conturile inactive?
text.en: How are inactive accounts managed?

recommendation.ro: Dezactivati automat conturile inactive >90 zile
recommendation.en: Automatically disable accounts inactive >90 days

text.ro: Sunt aplicatiile cloud integrate cu sistemul de autentificare central?
text.en: Are cloud applications integrated with central authentication?

recommendation.ro: Implementati SSO (SAML/OIDC) pentru toate aplicatiile cloud
recommendation.en: Implement SSO (SAML/OIDC) for all cloud apps

text.ro: Exista politici pentru parole si autentificare?
text.en: Do password and authentication policies exist?

recommendation.ro: Treceti la passphrases + protectie impotriva spraying
recommendation.en: Move to passphrases + spraying protection

text.ro: Este implementata segregarea rolurilor (RBAC)?
text.en: Is role segregation (RBAC) implemented?

recommendation.ro: Definiti si aplicati roluri least-privilege
recommendation.en: Define and enforce least-privilege roles

text.ro: Cine aproba accesul la resurse critice?
text.en: Who approves access to critical resources?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti flux de aprobare multi-level pentru acces critic
recommendation.en: Introduce multi-level approval for critical access

text.ro: Exista monitorizare a activitatii conturilor privilegiate?
text.en: Is privileged account activity monitored?

recommendation.ro: Activati logging si alerting pentru conturi privilegiate
recommendation.en: Enable logging and alerting for privileged accounts

description.ro: Domeniu de evaluare pentru identity & access management (iam)
description.en: Assessment domain for Identity & Access Management (IAM)

text.ro: Toti angajatii fac training anual de securitate?
text.en: Do all employees complete annual security training?

recommendation.ro: Implementati training anual obligatoriu cu tracking
recommendation.en: Implement mandatory annual training with tracking

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Este obligatoriu pentru noi angajati?
text.en: Is it mandatory for new hires?

recommendation.ro: Includeti modul de securitate in onboarding (primele 30 zile)
recommendation.en: Include security module in onboarding (first 30 days)

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Se fac simulari phishing si social engineering?
text.en: Are phishing and social engineering simulations performed?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti simulari trimestriale + raportare rezultate
recommendation.en: Introduce quarterly simulations + results reporting

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Se urmareste rezultatul simularilor?
text.en: Are simulation results tracked?

recommendation.ro: Definiti KPI-uri (click rate, report rate) si trend
recommendation.en: Define KPIs (click rate, report rate) and trend

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Exista plan de refresh pentru cunostintele de securitate?
text.en: Is there a knowledge refresh plan?

recommendation.ro: Trimiteti micro-training lunar / newsletter securitate
recommendation.en: Send monthly micro-training / security newsletter

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Angajatii stiu cui sa raporteze incidente?
text.en: Do employees know who to report incidents to?

recommendation.ro: Afisati clar canalul de raportare (email/telefon/portal)
recommendation.en: Clearly display reporting channel (email/phone/portal)

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Sunt promovate politici si reguli interne de securitate?
text.en: Are internal security policies and rules promoted?

recommendation.ro: Includeti politici in intranet + campanie anuala
recommendation.en: Include policies in intranet + annual campaign

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Se masoara impactul programului de awareness?
text.en: Is the impact of the awareness program measured?

recommendation.ro: Definiti metrici (phishing click rate, incidente raportate etc)
recommendation.en: Define metrics (phishing click rate, reported incidents etc)

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Ce metode de instruire se folosesc (online, workshop, email, etc.)?
text.en: What training methods are used (online, workshop, email, etc.)?

recommendation.ro: Combinati e-learning + workshop live + simulari
recommendation.en: Combine e-learning + live workshops + simulations

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Exista instruire specifica pentru grupuri cu acces privilegiat?
text.en: Is there targeted training for privileged users?

recommendation.ro: Realizati sesiuni dedicate pentru admini si dezvoltatori
recommendation.en: Conduct dedicated sessions for admins and developers

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

description.ro: Domeniu de evaluare pentru conștientizare și instruire în securitate
description.en: Assessment domain for Security Awareness & Training

text.ro: Toate device-urile au antivirus / EDR instalat?
text.en: Do all devices have antivirus / EDR installed?

recommendation.ro: Implementati EDR (Defender for Endpoint, CrowdStrike etc)
recommendation.en: Deploy EDR (Defender for Endpoint, CrowdStrike etc)

text.ro: Este protectia actualizata constant?
text.en: Is protection constantly updated?

recommendation.en: Enable automatic updates and compliance monitoring

text.ro: Exista monitorizare centrala a endpoint-urilor?
text.en: Is there central endpoint monitoring?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati SIEM / XDR cu agent pe toate endpoint-urile
recommendation.en: Use SIEM / XDR with agents on all endpoints

text.ro: Este patching-ul automat pentru sistemele critice?
text.en: Is patching automated for critical systems?

recommendation.ro: Implementati WSUS / Intune / patch management centralizat
recommendation.en: Implement WSUS / Intune / centralized patch management

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Se gestioneaza device-urile mobile?
text.en: Are mobile devices managed?

recommendation.ro: Implementati MDM pentru toate telefoane/tablete corporative
recommendation.en: Implement MDM for all corporate phones/tablets

text.ro: Exista criptare pentru laptopuri si device-uri mobile?

text.ro: Se fac verificari de conformitate pentru software neautorizat?

recommendation.en: Use software inventory tool + alerting

recommendation.ro: Testati periodic badge-uri, alarme si camerele de monitorizare
recommendation.en: Periodically test badges, alarms and monitoring cameras

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Exista protectie fizica pentru site-urile remote / OT?
text.en: Is physical protection in place for remote / OT sites?

recommendation.ro: Evaluati si intariti controalele fizice la locatiile remote / OT
recommendation.en: Assess and strengthen physical controls at remote / OT locations

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

description.ro: Domeniu de evaluare pentru confidentialitate, protectia datelor si GDPR
description.en: Assessment domain for privacy, data protection and GDPR

text.ro: Exista evidenta activitatilor de prelucrare (RoPA)?
text.en: Is a record of processing activities (RoPA) maintained?

recommendation.ro: Mentineti RoPA actualizat pentru toate procesele relevante
recommendation.en: Maintain an up-to-date RoPA for all relevant processing activities

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului

text.ro: Exista DPO sau responsabil pentru protectia datelor?
text.en: Is there a DPO or designated privacy responsible?

recommendation.ro: Nominalizati DPO / privacy lead si definiti responsabilitatile
recommendation.en: Appoint a DPO / privacy lead and define responsibilities

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Se efectueaza DPIA pentru prelucrarile cu risc ridicat?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti proces DPIA pentru initiativele cu risc ridicat
recommendation.en: Introduce a DPIA process for high-risk initiatives

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului
en: Screenshot or export proving control implementation

text.ro: Exista proces pentru gestionarea cererilor persoanelor vizate?

ro: Screenshot / export care dovedeste implementarea controlului

text.ro: Datele personale sunt minimizate si pastrate doar cat este necesar?

recommendation.en: Apply data minimization and a formal retention schedule
